user_goal: B032 AI Safety Eval Framework (Phase 2 / Stream 3.B) — 为 B036 AI advisor MVP 上线建立 safety eval CI gate：红队 15 样本 (3 fail 型 × 5 样本：α 收益预测数字 / β 无引用 hallucinate / γ 越界个股推荐) → LLM judge (Sonnet 4.6 via B031 LLMGateway routing task='safety_judge') → 100% 拦截才允许 deploy。仅 CI 预走 不做 runtime check (ai-safety-evals §1 用户预设)。Stream 3.B / Phase 2 (implementation-path-2026-05.md §4 第七个 batch)。**不做** runtime safety check / prompt template (B036) / advisor endpoint (B036) / 自动生成红队样本 / 跨 vendor judge cross-check / Frontend UI 改动。本批次 3 features：(F001) data/safety-evals/red-team-dataset.jsonl 15 样本 + LLM judge module + JudgeResult + JUDGE_PROMPT_TEMPLATE + INSUFFICIENT_GROUNDING signal + routing.py 加 safety_judge task + pytest ≥10；(F002) tests/safety/test_ai_advisor_red_team.py parametrize 15 样本 100% 拦截 + .github/workflows/ai-safety-eval.yml + workbench-deploy.yml deploy gate 集成 + pytest ≥5；(F003) Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收 + signoff (含 AI Safety Eval workflow 在 GitHub Actions 跑过一次 PASS)。**永久硬边界 100% 继承 v0.9.31 + (l)(m) + 新增 (n)(o)：** (n) Safety eval CI gate 100% 拦截 (任一样本 judge fail_triggered=true → deploy 拒绝) + (o) Safety eval dataset 修改必走 PR review (commit message 标 'safety-eval-dataset')。决策矩阵 (2026-05-27 用户已批 与 ai-safety-evals doc §1 预设一致)：严格度=中等 3 fail 型 × ≥5 样本 = 15 / LLM judge=Sonnet 4.6 单 judge (不跨 vendor) / Runtime=仅 CI 预走 / Dataset=15 样本起步 PR 手动扩。受益 v0.9.27 §12.7.1 paths-trigger + v0.9.30 §12.9 secret 三处接线 (复用 B031 AIGC_GATEWAY_API_KEY) + v0.9.31 §16/§22/§Decommission Checklist (本批次非 decommission)。B026 banner 仍 decommissioned 不破。F001+F002 generator，F003 codex。预估 1 个轻量-中型批次。Cost 估算：15 样本 × Sonnet ~$0.04/eval = ~$0.6/run × ~20 runs/月 ≈ ¥30/月 (远低于 B031 LLM ¥1500 cap)。
evaluator_feedback: 2026-05-28 Codex completed B032 F003 first-round verification: PASS. L1 passed cleanly: backend pytest 513 passed 2 skipped + ruff + mypy + alembic current at head; trade pytest 778; frontend vitest 172 + build + Playwright 38; npm audit remained moderate-only. Safety gates stayed green: AI Safety Eval workflow injected AIGC_GATEWAY_API_KEY, workbench-deploy.yml included AI Safety Eval gate, routing/judge/dataset wiring was present, and .next contained no gateway secret / judge leakage. L2 passed: production /api/health.version matched local main HEAD aebed14c8262a90db071e63584023b86a768955b; authenticated /api/debug/recent-errors returned count=0; protected-page HTML checks on /strategies /reports /recommendations /risk all returned BANNER_ABSENT; GitHub Actions run 26522914433 for workflow 'AI Safety Eval' completed success, with job 'safety-eval' and both key steps ('Run red-team safety eval (parametrize 15 samples)' and 'Verify safety eval workflow wiring') green. Signoff report: docs/test-reports/B032-ai-safety-eval-signoff-2026-05-28.md.
